name: Theta Gold Mines Limited
description: Theta Gold Mines Limited is an Australian-based gold development company focused on the exploration and development of precious metal assets in the world-renowned gold mining region of South Africa. The company holds a significant portfolio of prospective gold assets, including several surface and near-surface projects. With a resource base exceeding 6 million ounces, Theta Gold Mines aims to establish multiple mining operations to achieve a production target of over 160,000 ounces of gold per annum, leveraging the historical productivity and geological potential of the region to deliver long-term value to its shareholders.
